info.title: Taskip API
info.description: Taskip public API for managing contacts, companies, team members, invoices, quotations, support tickets, documents, projects, sales pipelines, meetings, and inbox conversations.

get.description: Retrieve all contacts with optional filtering and pagination.
Retrieve a specific contact by ID.

post.description: Send a client invitation to a contact.

secretKey.name: X-Secret-Key
secretKey.description: Secret key from Taskip dashboard Settings > API Application.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key
